response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks explicit executive leadership in agentic AI or fintech domains. The resume highlights technical versatility and open-source contributions, yet falls short on direct evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ or architecting production-grade multi-agent systems in regulated environments.
strengths: Diverse technical background spanning full-stack, distributed systems, and AI-agent tooling (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq).
Hands-on experience with event-driven architectures and real-time systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media).
Proven ability to build and maintain open-source platforms with production usage (e.g., GISCollective used by Green Map).
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience (e.g., CTO, VP Engineering) or track record scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers.
Agentic AI experience appears limited to tooling/frameworks rather than end-to-end production deployment in fintech/regulated environments.
Lacks direct fintech infrastructure expertise (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, or embedded finance).
